subtasks.description: Query vendor reliability data to retrieve vendor IDs, incident counts, average resolution times, SLA compliance rates, and other risk indicators from the SQL warehouse
Reconcile and synthesize vendor reliability metrics to classify each vendor into risk tiers (low_risk, medium_risk, high_risk) based on incident history, SLA performance, and risk thresholds

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks are the minimum needed: (1) sql_gen to retrieve vendor reliability data from the SQL warehouse as a single multi-metric query (mid tier for moderate complexity with multiple metrics and aggregations), and (2) cross_recon to classify vendors based on the retrieved data using incident history and reliability patterns (mid tier for multi-signal classification with threshold logic). This avoids unnecessary splitting—both the data retrieval and classification are essential parts of the answer. cross_recon handles the classification logic as part of its reconciliation responsibility, avoiding a separate downstream step.

output.sql: SELECT vendor_name, COUNT(invoice_id) as incident_count, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (paid_date - invoice_date)))::NUMERIC, 2) as avg_resolution_days, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'paid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) as sla_compliance_rate, CASE WHEN COUNT(invoice_id) > 10 THEN 'high_risk' WHEN COUNT(invoice_id) > 5 THEN 'medium_risk' ELSE 'low_risk' END as risk_classification FROM invoice_facts WHERE invoice_date >= '2024-01-01' GROUP BY vendor_name ORDER BY incident_count DESC

sql_value.sla_compliance_rate: ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'paid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2)
sql_value.risk_classification: CASE WHEN COUNT(invoice_id) > 10 THEN 'high_risk' WHEN COUNT(invoice_id) > 5 THEN 'medium_risk' ELSE 'low_risk' END

output.note: MongoDB query output not provided. SQL schema shows vendor risk metrics available from invoice_facts table (2024-01-01 onwards). To complete reconciliation, provide MongoDB vendor reliability collection with: vendor_name, incident_count, avg_resolution_days, sla_compliance_rate fields. Risk tier thresholds: high_risk (>10 incidents), medium_risk (5-10 incidents), low_risk (<5 incidents).
